name: White Peony
summary: It is best framed as a paeoniflorin-rich root with traditional-system relevance.
description: It is best framed as a paeoniflorin-rich root with traditional-system relevance.
safetyNotes: CNS-active potential; avoid stacking with sedatives, alcohol, sleep aids, antidepressants, or other psychoactive supplements without clinician review. Avoid pregnancy/breastfeeding use unless supervised.
interactions: Potential additive bleeding risk with anticoagulants/antiplatelets

sources.title: Composite microneedles loaded with Astragalus membranaceus polysaccharide nanoparticles promote wound healing by curbing the ROS/NF-κB pathway to regulate macrophage polarization
Advancement in the chemical analysis of Paeoniae Radix (Shaoyao)
Characterization of Isoorientin and Paeoniflorin as Botanical Glucocorticoid Receptor Modulators from White Peony and Chasteberry

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Root decoction/extract and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Root decoction/extract and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
